text: 那么四天一个小时加在一起下来 12000多人民币啊。 呵呵 虽然说因为弟弟是没有选择他是
traditional_chinese: 那麼四天一個小時加在一起下來，一萬二千多人民幣啊。呵呵，雖然說因為弟弟是沒有選擇，他是
English: So, four days, one hour added together, that's over 12,000 RMB. Haha, although it's true that my younger brother had no choice, he was
Vietnamese: Vậy thì bốn ngày,mỗi ngày một tiếng điều trị, tổng cộng hơn 12.000 nhân dân tệ.
French: Donc, quatre jours, une heure additionnée, ça fait plus de 12 000 RMB.
German: Also, vier Tage, eine Stunde zusammengerechnet, das sind über 12.000 RMB. Haha, obwohl es stimmt, dass mein jüngerer Bruder keine Wahl hatte, er war
